plugin_desc: Server Technology Sentry3 network-service SNMP collection for remote power, PDU and environmental monitor devices under Server Technology PEN 1718.3. This child template relies on the shared SNMP floor for MIB-II uptime and IF-MIB 64-bit HC interface traffic. The current MIB facts identify Sentry3 tower, infeed, outlet, temperature/humidity sensor, contact-closure and branch tables, but do not prove a stable shared scalar mapping for CPU, memory, fan or power health, so private health and PDU business counters are not promoted into shared device-health metrics.
name: NetworkService
